public static void ModifyStatementMethod(
	this IApiBuilder builder,
	string methodName,
	Action<ISqlStatementMethod> action
)

Parameters

builder
Type: QBM.CompositionApi.DefinitionIApiBuilder
methodName
Type: SystemString
action
Type: SystemActionISqlStatementMethod

Usage Note

In Visual Basic and C#, you can call this method as an instance method on any object of type IApiBuilder. When you use instance method syntax to call this method, omit the first parameter. For more information, see Extension Methods (Visual Basic) or Extension Methods (C# Programming Guide).
